questions.statement:
Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.<br />
Innuendo

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom.</p>

<p>After years of rivalry, the two families decided to <u>bury the hatchet.</u></p>
options: To end a quarrel by never talking to each other /
To end a quarrel and become friendly /

questions.statement:
<p>Choose the most appropriate synonym for the given word.</p>

<p>AFFLUENT</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Camaraderie</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom in the following sentence.</p>

<p>Irrespective of the chaos in the classroom, our class teacher stays <u>cool as a cucumber</u>.</p>
options: Scolds all the students in the classroom /

questions.statement:

<p>Someone who is reserved and shy.</p>
